source:
import React from 'react'; import { Heart, Edit2, Trash2, MapPin } from 'lucide-react'; import mockData from '@/data/mockProfileData.json'; export default function MyStoriesTab() { const { stories } = mockData; return (

My Uploaded Stories

{stories.map((story) => (
{story.district}

{story.title}

{story.excerpt}

{story.uploadDate}
{story.likes}
))}
{stories.length === 0 && (

You haven't uploaded any stories yet.

)}
); }
